datasync.task.filterrule.CfnAbout: Specifies which files, folders, and objects to include or exclude when transferring files from source to destination.

datasync.task.filterrule.FilterType.Description: The type of filter rule to apply. AWS DataSync only supports the SIMPLE_PATTERN rule type.

datasync.task.filterrule.Value.Description: A single filter string that consists of the patterns to include or exclude. The patterns are delimited by "|" (that is, a pipe), for example: `/folder1|/folder2`
